learning_objectives: Identify and discuss types of elder abuse
Discuss the issues related to elder abuse
Explain the Nurse Assistant role in preventing elder abuse
Describe the Nurse Assistant role in reporting elder abuse

media_prompt_placeholder.alt_text: Training visual: source-traced Objective 1. De-identified illustration; no PHI.

cards.learner_facing_content: Source-traced focus: Define key terminology. Review the approved source outline, use de-identified examples only, and apply report/observe/defer boundaries. Source excerpt support: Assignments Define key terminology A. Have students select A. Review the terms listed in the terminology section. A. Lecture/Discussion five words from the list B. Spell the listed terms accurately. B. Games: word searches, of key terminology and C. Pronounce the terms correctly. write a sentence for D. Use the terms in their proper context. crossword puzzles, each defining the term. Family Feud, Jeopardy, bingo, spelling bee, B. Administer vocabulary hangman, and pre-test and post-test. concent
